fields.name: CustomerID
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: CustomerID is a unique numeric identifier assigned to each individual customer in the mall for tracking and segmentation purposes within the dataset.

fields.name: Gender
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field records the self-identified sex of mall customers (Female or Male), used for demographic segmentation and analysis in retail marketing.

fields.name: Age
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: The "Age" field represents the age (in years) of individual mall customers, capturing their demographic information for analysis in customer segmentation and targeting strategies.

fields.name: Annual Income (k$)
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field represents the estimated annual income (in thousands of dollars) of individual mall customers, used to gauge their purchasing power for segmentation and marketing analysis.

fields.name: Spending Score (1-100)
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: Spending Score (1-100) represents a quantified value indicating a mall customer's spending behavior or purchasing potential, with higher scores suggesting greater propensity to spend or higher customer value.

formatted_summary:
## Table 1: Mall_Customer_Segmentation_Data (200 rows × 5 columns)

### Description
Data loaded from CSV file: 37.csv (Dataset: Mall Customer Segmentation Data)

### Schema (5 fields)
  - CustomerID -- type: int64, values: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, ..., 196, 197, 198, 199, 200
  - Gender -- type: object, values: Female, Male
  - Age -- type: int64, values: 18, 19, 20, 21, 22, ..., 66, 67, 68, 69, 70
  - Annual Income (k$) -- type: int64, values: 15, 16, 17, 18, 19, ..., 103, 113, 120, 126, 137
  - Spending Score (1-100) -- type: int64, values: 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, ..., 94, 95, 97, 98, 99

### Sample Data (first 5 rows)
```
   CustomerID  Gender  Age  Annual Income (k$)  Spending Score (1-100)
0           1    Male   19                  15                      39
1           2    Male   21                  15                      81
2           3  Female   20                  16                       6
3           4  Female   23                  16                      77
4           5  Female   31                  17                      40
```
